privacy: Template only. Put real Pushover tokens in .env or host secrets, never in this file.

reminders.name: Morning medication check
reminders.message: Check the medication instructions, log what was given, and note how Denise is feeling.

reminders.name: Breakfast / light food
reminders.message: Offer breakfast or light food and log hydration.

reminders.name: Morning walk
reminders.message: Walk, then note pain, stability, and whether ice is needed after.

reminders.name: Morning exercises
reminders.message: Complete the home exercise set exactly as PT or discharge instructions say.

reminders.name: Lunch / hydration
reminders.message: Offer lunch, encourage hydration, and log how Denise is doing.

reminders.name: Afternoon medication check
reminders.message: Review the medication schedule and log any exact instructions followed.

reminders.name: Afternoon walk
reminders.message: Walk and record pain, swelling, and confidence with movement.

reminders.name: Incentive spirometer
reminders.message: Use the incentive spirometer. For twice-per-hour schedules, create explicit :15 and :45 entries for the active window.

reminders.name: Incentive spirometer
reminders.message: Use the incentive spirometer. Keep private patient-specific exceptions in data/reminders.json on the host.

reminders.name: Afternoon exercises
reminders.message: Complete the next PT / exercise block and note any questions for PT.

reminders.name: Dinner / hydration
reminders.message: Offer dinner, fluids, and a quick comfort check.

reminders.name: Evening recovery log
reminders.message: Finish the daily log and note questions for PT or the surgeon.

reminders.name: PT follow-up example
reminders.message: Physical therapy follow-up. Bring questions, pain notes, and recovery updates.
